steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The model is $f(t) = 8000(2)^{t/300}$. The population doubles when the exponential factor equals 2, which happens when the exponent equals 1: set $t/300 = 1$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: The doubling time is the amount of time that makes the population change from $8000$ to $16000$. Since $t=300$ makes the exponent $1$, the factor is $2^1=2$, so the population doubles after 300 minutes.
